title: lastrea thelypteris var. squamigera
intro: Lastrea thelypteris var. squamigera, also known as the Sikkim fir-leaved fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea thelypteris var. squamigera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Lastrea thelypteris var. squamigera include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are made by steeping the leaves in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
